title: Philemon #5371
definition:
Philemon = "one who kisses"

 1) a resident of Colosse, converted to Christianity by Paul, and the
    recipient of the letter bearing his name
nasbUsage:
Definition: Philemon = "one who kisses"

 1) a resident of Colosse, converted to Christianity by Paul, and the
    recipient of the letter bearing his name

    NASB:  kindly, Philemon, a Chr.:
